title: Use the 50/30/20 rule
content: Divide your income into needs, wants, and savings so your spending is easier to control.

title: Save before spending
content: Put aside a small amount of money first before using the rest for daily expenses.

title: Avoid impulse buying
content: Wait at least one day before buying something that is not urgent.

title: Start investing with research
content: Do not invest just because of trends. Understand the risk and purpose before investing.

title: Track small expenses
content: Small daily spending like snacks, drinks, or delivery fees can become a large amount monthly.

title: 30% Emergency
content: 30% of the money is going to go to the saving

title: ASNB
content: 10% of the money into ASNB Account
